effect: Roll on the surge table at the start of each turn for 1 minute, ignoring this result.
Friendly creature appears for 1 minute; roll 1d4 for type.
Regain 5 HP at the start of each turn for 1 minute.
Creatures have disadvantage on saves vs your next spell within 1 minute.
Roll 1d8 for a random cosmetic or sensory effect lasting 1 minute (one lasts 24 hours).
Your action-time spells become bonus actions for 1 minute.
You shift to the Astral Plane until end of next turn, then return.
Next damaging spell within 1 minute deals maximum damage dice.
You gain resistance to all damage for 1 minute.
You become a potted plant until next turn; incapacitated and vulnerable.
Teleport 20 ft as a bonus action each turn for 1 minute.
You and up to 3 creatures become invisible for 1 minute until attacking, damaging, or casting.
Spectral shield grants +2 AC and Magic Missile immunity for 1 minute.
You can take one extra action this turn.
Cast a random spell (1d10); concentration not required; lasts full duration.
Flammable nonmagical objects you touch ignite and take minor fire damage.
If you die within the next hour, you revive as if via the Reincarnate spell.
You are frightened until the end of your next turn; DM chooses the source.
Teleport up to 60 ft to a visible unoccupied space.
Random creature within 60 ft is poisoned for 1d4 hours.
You emit bright light for 1 minute; creatures ending turns within 5 ft are blinded until next turn.
Up to 3 creatures within 30 ft take 1d10 necrotic; you heal equal to total damage dealt.
Up to 3 creatures within 30 ft take 4d10 lightning damage.
You and all creatures within 30 ft have vulnerability to piercing damage for 1 minute.

Roll 1d6: 1) You regain 2d10 HP; 2) An ally within 300 ft regains 2d10 HP; 3) You regain your lowest-level expended spell slot; 4) An ally regains their lowest-level expended spell slot; 5) You regain all sorcery points; 6) All effects from row 17-20 affect you simultaneously.
